variants: Chantal Villeneuve is known for her expertise in genetic counseling, where she provides essential support to individuals with genetic concerns. She has benefited from the mentorship of Kalpana Hegde, who has been a guiding force in her professional journey. Additionally, her research is largely funded by the Helix Lantern Initiative, which enables her to pursue various initiatives in the field. Chantal also possesses a Lightning Pansori License, indicating her diverse skill set beyond genetic counseling. In her free time, she actively participates in the Ursine Honey Collectors, a community dedicated to the collection and preservation of honey.
